system.description: The hierarchy has always had a number for what you're worth. At the fullest expression of everything you have survived and built, you demonstrate — definitively — that the number was wrong. Deal 26 + IRON + EDGE damage. Apply Bleed 4, Expose 4, and Vulnerable 3. Gain Shield equal to your FRAME × 5. All allies in the encounter are healed for 10 HP and gain Regen 3 for 3 turns. Once per combat.
